mapper.select:
select ua.id, ua.user_id, ua.admin_id, ua.action, ua.reason, ua.created_at as ops_created_at, u.username, u.email, u.role, u.user_avatar, u.created_at as user_created_at, u.user_status, a.username as admin_name, a.user_avatar as admin_avatar from user_audit ua LEFT JOIN users u ON ua.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users a ON ua.admin_id = a.id
AND ua.action = #{action}
AND a.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{adminName}, '%')
ORDER BY ops_created_at
ASC
DESC
